---
title: "Supplementary: ARI vs Parameters"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: lumen
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggtext)
library(patchwork)
library(tidyr)
library(here)

analysis_dir <- here("analysis")

source(file.path(analysis_dir, "knitr.R"))
source(file.path(analysis_dir, "theme.R"))
theme_set(theme_paper(base_size = 12))
```

```{r load_data, include=FALSE}
source(file.path(analysis_dir, "data.R"))
```

# ARI v params

```{r supp-ari-vs-params, fig.height=8, fig.width=6.69}
plot_df <- metrics_new %>% filter(filtering == "manual", d_cluster == 0)

make_param_plot <- function(df, x_col, group_cols, x_label) {
  df_plot <- df %>%
    mutate(
      path_group = interaction(across(all_of(group_cols)), drop = TRUE)
    ) %>%
    arrange(dataset, method, path_group, .data[[x_col]])

  pos <- position_dodge(width = 0.5)

  ggplot(
    df_plot, aes(
      x = as.factor(.data[[x_col]]), y = agree_ari_leiden,
      group = path_group, color = method
    )
  ) +
    geom_point(position = pos, size = 0.9, alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_line(position = pos, linewidth = 0.7, alpha = 0.5) +
    facet_wrap(~dataset, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_color_method(name = "Method") +
    labs(x = x_label, y = "ARI - Leiden", color = "Method")
}

p_n_comp <- make_param_plot(
  plot_df, "n_comp",
  c("dataset", "method", "filtering", "n_neig", "n_hvg"),
  "n_comp"
)
p_n_neig <- make_param_plot(
  plot_df, "n_neig",
  c("dataset", "method", "filtering", "n_comp", "n_hvg"),
  "n_neig"
)
p_n_hvg <- make_param_plot(
  plot_df, "n_hvg",
  c("dataset", "method", "filtering", "n_comp", "n_neig"),
  "n_hvg"
)

(p_n_comp / p_n_neig / p_n_hvg) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") & theme(legend.position = "bottom") &
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 2)))
```
